mapper.select:
SELECT n.fac_code, find_fac_name(n.fac_code) fac_name, r.breakdown, r.rep_class_code, r.rep_request_date FROM fac_not n LEFT JOIN rep r ON(n.fac_code=r.fac_code) WHERE n.fac_not_reason_code='NF4' AND r.rep_class_code IS NULL AND n.not_end_date IS NULL
AND find_fac_name(n.fac_code) LIKE '%'||#{facName}||'%'
ANd r.rep_process_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{repProcessDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{repProcessDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code WHERE main_code='RD'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rep (rep_no, fac_code, rep_request_date, breakdown, rep_requester, rep_class_code) VALUES (AUTO_REP_CODE(), #{facCode}, #{repRequestDate}, #{breakdown}, #{empCode}, #{repClassCode})
mapper.select:
SELECT rep_no, fac_code, find_fac_name(fac_code) fac_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(rep_class_code) rep_class_code, rep_request_date, breakdown FROM rep WHERE rep_history IS NULL
AND find_fac_name(fac_code) LIKE '%'||#{facName}||'%'
ANd r.rep_process_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{repProcessDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{repProcessDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.update: UPDATE fac_not SET not_end_date=sysdate WHERE fac_not_reason_code='NF4' AND fac_code=#{facCode}
